errors.EMAIL_EXISTS: Email already exists, please use another
errors.INVALID_CODE: Code is invalid or has expired
errors.PASSWORD_MISMATCH: Password and confirmation do not match
errors.WORD_ALREADY_IN_LIST: This word is already in your study list
errors.SPEAKING_AUDIO_TOO_LARGE: The recording is too large, please record a shorter answer
errors.SPEAKING_GRADING_FAILED: AI grading failed, please try again
errors.SPEAKING_STORAGE_FAILED: Could not save your recording, please try again
errors.SPEAKING_AUDIO_SILENT: No speech detected in your recording. Please check your microphone and try again
errors.SPEAKING_NOT_ENGLISH: Please answer in English. Only English responses are graded

account.title: Account Settings
account.name: Display name
account.save_error: Failed to save, please try again

home.hero_desc: A Chinese vocabulary system organized by topic, with pinyin, sino-Vietnamese, and real example sentences.
home.vocab_section_desc: 120,000+ Chinese words covering HSK 1–9, each with pinyin, sino-Vietnamese reading, and real example sentences. No sign-up needed to explore.
home.feature_topics_desc: Vocabulary organized by topic: family, work, travel, food...
home.feature_vocab_desc: Each word includes pinyin, sino-Vietnamese reading, English and Vietnamese meanings.
home.feature_srs_desc: SM-2 algorithm schedules reviews optimally so you remember more in less time.

dashboard.hsk_level_prompt: What's your level? Pick one so quizzes can suggest words that fit you better
dashboard.hsk_level_current: Your current level: HSK {level} — tap to change
dashboard.hsk_level_save_error: Couldn't save your level, please try again

words.page_subtitle: {total} HSK words — search and filter by level or topic
words.no_results: No words found matching your search
words.login_to_add: Log in to add to study list

speaking.title: IELTS Speaking Practice
speaking.subtitle: Record your answer and get instant AI feedback with band scores
speaking.hint_part1: Aim for 20–45 seconds: answer directly, then add a reason or an example.
speaking.hint_part2: You have 1 minute to prepare, then speak for 1–2 minutes.
speaking.hint_part3: Aim for 30–60 seconds: give your opinion, explain it, then add an example.
speaking.too_short: The recording is too short, please speak for at least a few seconds
speaking.no_speech_detected: No speech detected. Please check your microphone and try again.
speaking.mic_error: Could not access the microphone. Please allow microphone permission in your browser.
speaking.submit_failed: Could not grade your answer, please try again
speaking.grading_note: The AI examiner is listening to your answer... this takes about 15–30 seconds
speaking.delete_failed: Could not delete, please try again
speaking.progress_empty: Not enough data yet. Complete a few attempts to see your trend.
speaking.compare_title: Compare attempts on the same question
speaking.compare_empty: Answer the same question at least twice to compare your attempts.
speaking.rhythm_hint: nPVI measures how much vowel length varies between syllables. Native English is stress-timed (≈{ref}); Vietnamese is syllable-timed (≈45). Higher means more English-like rhythm.
speaking.rhythm_close: Your rhythm is close to native English stress-timing
speaking.rhythm_syllable: Your rhythm leans syllable-timed — try stressing content words and reducing weak vowels

quiz.landing_subtitle: Test your memory with multiple-choice questions
quiz.default_desc: 10 questions from your study list, 4 options each
quiz.custom_desc: Pick topics, HSK levels, question count and more
quiz.config_practice_mode_hint: This attempt won't be saved to your history or stats
quiz.history_subtitle: Your past quiz attempts and overall performance
quiz.not_enough_desc: There aren't enough words to build a quiz. Add more words to your study list first.

stats.leech_hint: {count} words suspended (leech) — you can unsuspend them individually

flashcard.completed_desc: You have reviewed all words for today
flashcard.no_due_desc: You haven't added any words to your list yet, or you've already reviewed everything today.
